DeveSolToSharp 1.0.23
Copyright (C) 1 author

  -n, --namespace    The namespace to generate the objects in (Default: It 
                     tries to be smart)

  -i, --inputdir     The directory to find the .abi files in (Default: 
                     currentdirectory)

  -o, --outputdir    The directory to generate the C# files in (Default: 
                     inputdirectory\DeveSolToSharp\)

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
